summary: Hydrated preflight shows the local-store open candidates are now closed. #65894 is the canonical path because it was merged via pinned squash merge as e2b825eba4e224ad694944be3e16581614734f14. #52261 and #53459 are independent closed docker-compose PRs, and #68702/#68684 are a separate Docker local-provider family already closed/fixed on main. No GitHub mutation is planned.
